name: Star
author: Craige Schensted (Ea Ea) & Ea Ea (1983) / AGP port
description: Craige Schensted's drawless connection-scoring game on a hexagon-of-hexes whose six sides alternate length (so the odd perimeter forbids ties). Around the board sit non-playable 'partial hexagon' border cells used only for scoring: a corner playing cell touches 3, an edge cell touches 2. Players alternately place a stone or pass; the game ends on two successive passes. A connected group touching at least 3 border cells is a 'star' worth (border cells touched − 2); most points wins.
